title: Unlocking Piano by Ear
audience: Aspiring piano players who feel stuck
goal: Encourage viewers to download the free cheat sheet
hook: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.

scenes.headline: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.
scenes.voiceover: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order.

assets.description: A frustrated musician looking confused while reading complicated sheet music at a piano.

scenes.headline: You're not alone.
scenes.voiceover: Many struggle with the complexity of sheet music and long lessons that seem never-ending.

scenes.headline: Simplify your learning.
scenes.body: Instead of getting lost in notes, you can learn to play the songs you love by ear, using just four simple chords.
scenes.voiceover: But what if I told you there's a simpler way? Instead of getting lost in notes, you can learn to play the songs you love by ear, using just four simple chords.

scenes.headline: Imagine the joy.
scenes.body: Picture yourself playing your favorite tunes without relying on sheet music.
scenes.voiceover: Imagine sitting at the piano, feeling confident, and playing your favorite tunes without relying on sheet music.

assets.description: A Black musician playing confidently at a piano in a church, smiling and enjoying the music.

scenes.headline: Start your journey today!
scenes.voiceover: Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and start your musical journey today.

voiceover_script: Most piano students quit because they're learning the wrong things in the wrong order. Many struggle with the complexity of sheet music and long lessons that seem never-ending. But what if I told you there's a simpler way? Instead of getting lost in notes, you can learn to play the songs you love by ear, using just four simple chords. Imagine sitting at the piano, feeling confident, and playing your favorite tunes without relying on sheet music. This is possible for you! Get the free 4-chord cheat sheet and start your musical journey today.
thumbnail_concept: A smiling musician confidently playing the piano
caption: Unlock your musical potential with our free cheat sheet!
